title: lepidagathis incurva var. lophostachyoides
intro: Lepidagathis incurva var. lophostachyoides is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flower family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and alleviate gastrointestinal issues. Lepidagathis incurva var. lophostachyoides is often prepared as a decoction or infusion to be used as a herbal remedy, and it has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the regions where it is native.
